case_title: THOMAS MCDONALD VS. PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCDONALD, THOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-22-2024 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY MCDONALD, THOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-22-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-22-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF, THOMAS MCDONALD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT, PG & E IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY KIT WONG. EXHIBITS RETAINED FOR BOTH PARTIES. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: L. YOUNG. NOT REPORTED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-29-2024, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCDONALD, THOMAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY $12,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY
